# TrinityStore
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-PT">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Trinity · Sites que Vendem</title>
<meta name="description" content="Trinity — Criamos websites premium que transformam visitantes em clientes. Orçamento 100% grátis, resposta em 2h.">
<meta property="og:title" content="Trinity · Sites que Vendem">
<meta property="og:description" content="Websites premium para o seu negócio. Design, velocidade e resultados reais.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Raleway:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════
   TRINITY DESIGN SYSTEM
═══════════════════════════════════════ */
:root {
  --ink:      #07080c;
  --ink2:     #0c0d14;
  --ink3:     #111219;
  --ink4:     #16171f;
  --gold:     #f59e0b;
  --gold2:    #fbbf24;
  --orange:   #ea580c;
  --amber:    #f97316;
  --glow:     rgba(245,158,11,.15);
  --glow2:    rgba(245,158,11,.07);
  --glow3:    rgba(245,158,11,.04);
  --border:   rgba(245,158,11,.18);
  --border2:  rgba(245,158,11,.08);
  --border3:  rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  --text:     #f0ece6;
  --text2:    #9a9490;
  --text3:    #5a5550;
  --fh:       'Cinzel', serif;
  --fb:       'Raleway', sans-serif;
  --ease:     cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  --ease2:    cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);
}

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }
body {
  background: var(--ink);
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: var(--fb);
  overflow-x: hidden;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}
::selection { background: var(--gold); color: var(--ink); }
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 3px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--ink2); }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--gold); border-radius: 2px; }

/* ── CUSTOM CURSOR ── */
#cur { position:fixed;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold);pointer-events:none;z-index:99999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .2s,height .2s; }
#cur-ring { position:fixed;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.4);pointer-events:none;z-index:99998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .35s var(--ease),height .35s var(--ease); }

/* ── UTILS ── */
.wrap { max-width:1160px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 28px; }
.sec { padding:100px 0; }
.sec-alt { background:var(--ink2); }

.grad { background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--orange)); -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text; }
.grad2 { background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold2),var(--amber)); -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; background-clip:text; }

.h1 { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:clamp(44px,7.5vw,104px); line-height:.92; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:3px; }
.h2 { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:clamp(28px,4.5vw,60px); line-height:1.02; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; }
.h3 { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:clamp(16px,2.2vw,22px); font-weight:600; letter-spacing:1.5px; }
.lead { font-size:17px; color:var(--text2); line-height:1.9; font-weight:300; }
.small { font-size:13px; color:var(--text2); line-height:1.75; }

.eyebrow { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; font-family:var(--fh); font-size:9px; letter-spacing:5px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:16px; }
.eyebrow::before { content:''; width:22px; height:1px; background:var(--gold); }
.eyebrow::after  { content:''; width:22px; height:1px; background:var(--gold); }

.divider { height:1px; background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--border2),transparent); }

/* ── BUTTONS ── */
.btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:9px; padding:14px 30px; font-family:var(--fb); font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2.5px; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; border-radius:2px; transition:all .3s var(--ease); position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
.btn-fire { background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--orange)); color:var(--ink); box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(245,158,11,.3); }
.btn-fire::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold2),var(--amber)); opacity:0; transition:opacity .3s; }
.btn-fire:hover::before { opacity:1; }
.btn-fire:hover { box-shadow:0 6px 32px rgba(245,158,11,.5); transform:translateY(-2px); }
.btn-fire span, .btn-fire svg { position:relative; z-index:1; }
.btn-line { background:transparent; color:var(--text); border:1px solid var(--border3); }
.btn-line:hover { border-color:var(--gold); color:var(--gold2); background:var(--glow3); }
.btn-gold-line { background:transparent; color:var(--gold); border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.35); font-size:10px; padding:10px 22px; }
.btn-gold-line:hover { background:var(--glow); border-color:var(--gold); }

/* ════════════ NAVBAR ════════════ */
#navbar { position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:1000; transition:all .35s var(--ease); }
#navbar.stuck { background:rgba(7,8,12,.95); backdrop-filter:blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(24px); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2); }
.nav-inner { max-width:1160px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 28px; height:74px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; }
.logo { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:13px; text-decoration:none; }
.logo img { width:36px; height:36px; object-fit:contain; filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(245,158,11,.55)); }
.logo-txt { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1px; }
.logo-name { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:19px; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:4px; color:var(--text); line-height:1; }
.logo-sub  { font-size:7px; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text3); }
.nav-links { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:30px; list-style:none; }
.nav-links a { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2.5px; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; color:var(--text2); transition:color .2s; position:relative; padding-bottom:4px; }
.nav-links a::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:1px; background:var(--gold); transform:scaleX(0); transform-origin:left; transition:transform .28s; }
.nav-links a:hover { color:var(--text); }
.nav-links a:hover::after { transform:scaleX(1); }
.nav-cta { display:none; }
.hamburger { display:none; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; cursor:pointer; background:none; border:none; padding:4px; }
.hamburger span { width:22px; height:1.5px; background:var(--text); display:block; transition:all .3s; }
/* Mobile nav */
.mob-menu { position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:999; background:var(--ink); display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:26px; transform:translateX(100%); transition:transform .42s var(--ease2); }
.mob-menu.open { transform:translateX(0); }
.mob-menu a { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:30px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); text-decoration:none; letter-spacing:2px; transition:color .2s; }
.mob-menu a:hover { color:var(--gold2); }
.mob-x { position:absolute; top:22px; right:26px; background:none; border:none; font-size:26px; color:var(--text2); cursor:pointer; line-height:1; }

/* ════════════ HERO ════════════ */
#hero { min-height:100vh; display:flex; align-items:center; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
/* Ambient */
.h-amb { position:absolute; border-radius:50%; pointer-events:none; }
.h-amb-1 { width:900px; height:900px; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(245,158,11,.055) 0%,rgba(234,88,12,.025) 50%,transparent 70%); }
.h-amb-2 { width:600px; height:600px; top:-100px; right:-200px; background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(245,158,11,.04) 0%,transparent 65%); animation:amb2 9s ease-in-out infinite; }
.h-amb-3 { width:400px; height:400px; bottom:0; left:-100px; background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(234,88,12,.03) 0%,transparent 65%); animation:amb2 11s ease-in-out infinite reverse; }
@keyframes amb2 { 0%,100%{transform:scale(1) translate(0,0)} 50%{transform:scale(1.08) translate(20px,-20px)} }

/* Scan lines texture */
.scan { position:absolute; inset:0; background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 2px,rgba(0,0,0,.03) 2px,rgba(0,0,0,.03) 4px); pointer-events:none; }

/* Floating particles */
.pts { position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; overflow:hidden; }
.pt { position:absolute; border-radius:50%; background:var(--gold); animation:ptRise linear infinite; opacity:0; }
@keyframes ptRise { 0%{transform:translateY(110vh) scale(0);opacity:0} 8%{opacity:.7} 92%{opacity:.1} 100%{transform:translateY(-10px) scale(.2);opacity:0} }

.hero-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:60px; align-items:center; padding-top:74px; position:relative; z-index:2; }
.hero-text {}
.hero-free { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:9px; padding:8px 18px; border-radius:100px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(245,158,11,.15),rgba(234,88,12,.1)); border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.3); font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold2); margin-bottom:22px; }
.hero-free-dot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--gold); animation:blink 2s infinite; }
@keyframes blink { 0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.2} }
.hero-eyebrow { margin-bottom:18px; }
.hero-title { margin-bottom:22px; }
.hero-desc { margin-bottom:34px; max-width:490px; }
.hero-actions { display:flex; gap:13px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:44px; }
.hero-kpis { display:flex; gap:0; padding-top:32px; border-top:1px solid var(--border3); }
.kpi { flex:1; text-align:center; padding:0 8px; position:relative; }
.kpi:not(:last-child)::after { content:''; position:absolute; right:0; top:10%; bottom:10%; width:1px; background:var(--border3); }
.kpi-n { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:32px; font-weight:900; line-height:1; color:var(--text); }
.kpi-n em { color:var(--gold2); font-style:normal; }
.kpi-l { font-size:9px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text3); margin-top:5px; }

/* Hero visual */
.hero-visual { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; position:relative; }
.ring { position:absolute; border-radius:50%; border:1px solid; animation:ringPulse ease-in-out infinite; }
.ring-1 { width:380px; height:380px; border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.1); animation-duration:5s; }
.ring-2 { width:310px; height:310px; border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.07); animation-duration:5s; animation-delay:.8s; }
.ring-3 { width:240px; height:240px; border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.12); animation-duration:4s; animation-delay:.4s; }
@keyframes ringPulse { 0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.5} 50%{transform:scale(1.05);opacity:1} }
.hero-logo { width:260px; height:260px; object-fit:contain; position:relative; z-index:2; filter:drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(245,158,11,.5)) drop-shadow(0 0 90px rgba(234,88,12,.2)); animation:logoHover 7s ease-in-out infinite; }
@keyframes logoHover { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg)} 50%{transform:translateY(-14px) rotate(1.5deg)} }
/* Glow orb behind logo */
.hero-orb { position:absolute; width:280px; height:280px; border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(245,158,11,.12) 0%,rgba(234,88,12,.06) 50%,transparent 70%); z-index:1; animation:logoHover 7s ease-in-out infinite; }

/* Scroll cue */
.scroll-cue { position:absolute; bottom:36px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:8px; font-size:8px; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text3); z-index:2; animation:cue 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
.scroll-line { width:1px; height:52px; background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--gold),transparent); }
@keyframes cue { 0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(8px)} }

/* ════════════ MARQUEE ════════════ */
.marquee-bar { background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--amber),var(--orange),var(--amber),var(--gold)); padding:12px 0; overflow:hidden; }
.mq-track { display:flex; gap:36px; white-space:nowrap; animation:mqRoll 18s linear infinite; }
.mq-track:hover { animation-play-state:paused; }
.mq-item { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:13px; flex-shrink:0; }
.mq-item::after { content:'✦'; font-size:7px; opacity:.5; }
@keyframes mqRoll { 0%{transform:translateX(0)} 100%{transform:translateX(-50%)} }

/* ════════════ SERVICES ════════════ */
.svc-head { text-align:center; margin-bottom:62px; }
.svc-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:1px; background:var(--border2); border:1px solid var(--border2); }
.svc-c { background:var(--ink); padding:42px 30px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; transition:background .3s; }
.svc-c::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--orange)); transform:scaleX(0); transform-origin:left; transition:transform .4s var(--ease); }
.svc-c:hover { background:var(--ink3); }
.svc-c:hover::before { transform:scaleX(1); }
.svc-n { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:60px; font-weight:900; color:rgba(245,158,11,.06); line-height:1; margin-bottom:16px; transition:color .3s; }
.svc-c:hover .svc-n { color:rgba(245,158,11,.1); }
.svc-ico { width:50px; height:50px; border-radius:4px; background:var(--glow2); border:1px solid var(--border); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:20px; margin-bottom:18px; }
.svc-c h3 { margin-bottom:10px; }
.svc-c p { font-size:14px; color:var(--text2); line-height:1.8; margin-bottom:18px; }
.svc-fs { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:7px; margin-bottom:20px; }
.svc-f { font-size:13px; color:var(--text2); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
.svc-f::before { content:''; width:10px; height:1px; background:var(--gold); flex-shrink:0; }
.svc-price { border-top:1px solid var(--border3); padding-top:16px; display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:4px; }
.p-from { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text3); }
.p-val { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:28px; font-weight:900; color:var(--gold2); }
.p-val sup { font-size:12px; font-family:var(--fb); vertical-align:top; margin-top:5px; display:inline-block; }
/* Add-ons row */
.addons { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:1px; background:var(--border2); margin-top:1px; border-left:1px solid var(--border2); border-right:1px solid var(--border2); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2); }
.addon { background:var(--ink); padding:24px 22px; transition:background .3s; }
.addon:hover { background:var(--ink3); }
.addon-ico { width:38px; height:38px; border-radius:3px; background:var(--glow2); border:1px solid var(--border2); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:16px; margin-bottom:12px; }
.addon h4 { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:13px; letter-spacing:1px; margin-bottom:6px; }
.addon p { font-size:12px; color:var(--text2); line-height:1.6; margin-bottom:12px; }

/* ════════════ PROCESS ════════════ */
.proc-head { text-align:center; margin-bottom:64px; }
.proc-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); position:relative; }
.proc-grid::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:39px; left:12%; right:12%; height:1px; background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--gold),var(--gold),transparent); z-index:0; }
.proc-step { text-align:center; padding:0 18px; position:relative; z-index:1; }
.proc-num { width:78px; height:78px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--ink3); border:1px solid var(--border); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-family:var(--fh); font-size:22px; font-weight:900; color:var(--gold2); margin:0 auto 20px; transition:all .35s; }
.proc-step:hover .proc-num { background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--orange)); color:var(--ink); border-color:transparent; box-shadow:0 0 28px rgba(245,158,11,.45); }
.proc-step h4 { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:14px; letter-spacing:1px; margin-bottom:8px; color:var(--text); }
.proc-step p { font-size:13px; color:var(--text2); line-height:1.7; }

/* ════════════ PORTFOLIO ════════════ */
.port-bar { display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:40px; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:18px; }
.port-filters { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.pf { padding:7px 16px; border-radius:100px; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2.5px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; transition:all .25s; border:1px solid var(--border3); background:transparent; color:var(--text2); font-family:var(--fb); }
.pf.act,.pf:hover { background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--orange)); border-color:transparent; color:var(--ink); }
.port-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); grid-template-rows:260px 220px; gap:10px; }
.port-i { border-radius:3px; overflow:hidden; position:relative; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:transform .3s; }
.port-i:hover { transform:scale(.982); }
.port-i:nth-child(1) { grid-column:span 2; grid-row:span 2; }
.port-emoji { font-size:54px; opacity:.1; pointer-events:none; transition:opacity .3s; }
.port-i:nth-child(1) .port-emoji { font-size:88px; }
.port-i:hover .port-emoji { opacity:.06; }
.port-ov { position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(7,8,12,.95) 0%,rgba(7,8,12,.1) 55%,transparent 100%); display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:flex-end; padding:22px; opacity:0; transition:opacity .3s; }
.port-i:hover .port-ov { opacity:1; }
.port-cat { font-size:8px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold2); margin-bottom:5px; font-weight:700; font-family:var(--fh); }
.port-name { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:19px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); }
.port-yr { font-size:11px; color:var(--text3); margin-top:3px; }
.port-badge { position:absolute; top:14px; left:14px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--orange)); color:var(--ink); font-size:8px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:1px; font-family:var(--fh); }
.port-i:nth-child(1){background:linear-gradient(145deg,#0b1018,#121928)}
.port-i:nth-child(2){background:linear-gradient(145deg,#0e130f,#161e17)}
.port-i:nth-child(3){background:linear-gradient(145deg,#12090a,#1d1012)}
.port-i:nth-child(4){background:linear-gradient(145deg,#0b0d14,#12151e)}
.port-i:nth-child(5){background:linear-gradient(145deg,#100d0a,#191410)}

/* ════════════ PRICING ════════════ */
.price-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:1px; background:var(--border2); border:1px solid var(--border2); }
.pc { background:var(--ink2); padding:38px 28px; position:relative; }
.pc.hot { background:var(--ink3); outline:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.3); outline-offset:-1px; }
.hot-badge { position:absolute; top:-1px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--orange)); color:var(--ink); font-size:8px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:3px; padding:5px 14px; font-family:var(--fh); white-space:nowrap; }
.pc-tier { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:9px; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text3); margin-bottom:12px; }
.pc-amt { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:48px; font-weight:900; line-height:1; margin-bottom:4px; }
.pc-amt sup { font-size:17px; color:var(--gold2); vertical-align:top; margin-top:11px; display:inline-block; }
.pc-note { font-size:11px; color:var(--text3); margin-bottom:22px; }
.pc-hr { height:1px; background:var(--border3); margin:18px 0; }
.pc-fs { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; margin-bottom:26px; }
.pci { font-size:13px; color:var(--text2); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
.pci.y::before { content:'✓'; color:var(--gold2); font-weight:800; flex-shrink:0; }
.pci.n { opacity:.28; }
.pci.n::before { content:'×'; color:var(--text3); font-weight:800; flex-shrink:0; }

/* ════════════ TESTIMONIALS ════════════ */
.tst-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:18px; }
.tst-c { background:var(--ink3); border:1px solid var(--border3); border-radius:3px; padding:28px; transition:border-color .3s; }
.tst-c:hover { border-color:var(--border); }
.tst-q { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:48px; color:var(--gold); opacity:.18; line-height:1; margin-bottom:8px; }
.tst-txt { font-size:14px; color:var(--text2); line-height:1.85; font-style:italic; margin-bottom:20px; }
.tst-auth { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; }
.tst-av { width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-family:var(--fh); font-size:14px; font-weight:700; color:var(--ink); flex-shrink:0; }
.tst-name { font-weight:700; font-size:14px; color:var(--text); }
.tst-biz { font-size:11px; color:var(--text3); margin-top:2px; }
.tst-stars { color:var(--gold); font-size:11px; letter-spacing:2px; margin-top:3px; }

/* ════════════ FAQ ════════════ */
.faq-wrap { max-width:740px; margin:0 auto; }
.faq-i { border-bottom:1px solid var(--border3); }
.faq-q { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:19px 0; cursor:pointer; font-size:15px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text); transition:color .2s; letter-spacing:.3px; user-select:none; }
.faq-q:hover { color:var(--gold2); }
.faq-ico { width:26px; height:26px; border-radius:50%; border:1px solid var(--border); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:15px; color:var(--text2); flex-shrink:0; transition:all .3s; }
.faq-i.open .faq-ico { background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--orange)); border-color:transparent; color:var(--ink); transform:rotate(45deg); }
.faq-a { font-size:14px; color:var(--text2); line-height:1.85; max-height:0; overflow:hidden; transition:max-height .45s var(--ease),padding .4s; }
.faq-i.open .faq-a { max-height:220px; padding-bottom:20px; }

/* ════════════ CTA BANNER ════════════ */
.cta-sec { position:relative; overflow:hidden; padding:110px 0; text-align:center; }
.cta-sec::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 70% at 50% 50%,rgba(245,158,11,.07) 0%,transparent 70%); pointer-events:none; }
.cta-logo-big { width:88px; height:88px; object-fit:contain; filter:drop-shadow(0 0 28px rgba(245,158,11,.6)); margin-bottom:24px; animation:logoHover 7s ease-in-out infinite; }
.cta-inner { position:relative; z-index:1; }
.cta-inner .h2 { margin-bottom:14px; }
.cta-inner .lead { max-width:400px; margin:0 auto 32px; }
.cta-btns { display:flex; gap:13px; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.cta-note { font-size:11px; color:var(--text3); margin-top:16px; letter-spacing:1px; }

/* ════════════ CONTACT ════════════ */
.contact-g { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:52px; align-items:start; }
.c-form { background:var(--ink3); border:1px solid var(--border3); border-radius:3px; padding:34px; }
.fg { margin-bottom:16px; }
.fg label { display:block; font-size:9px; letter-spacing:2.5px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text3); margin-bottom:7px; font-weight:700; }
.fg input, .fg select, .fg textarea { width:100%; background:var(--ink2); border:1px solid var(--border3); color:var(--text); padding:12px 14px; border-radius:2px; font-family:var(--fb); font-size:14px; transition:border-color .2s; -webkit-appearance:none; appearance:none; }
.fg input::placeholder, .fg textarea::placeholder { color:var(--text3); }
.fg input:focus, .fg select:focus, .fg textarea:focus { outline:none; border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.5); }
.fg textarea { height:90px; resize:vertical; }
.fg-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:14px; }
.form-ok { display:none; text-align:center; padding:22px; background:rgba(245,158,11,.07); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:3px; margin-top:14px; }
.form-ok.show { display:block; animation:fadeUp .4s ease; }
@keyframes fadeUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }

.c-aside {}
.c-aside .eyebrow { justify-content:flex-start; }
.c-aside .h2 { font-size:clamp(22px,3vw,38px); margin-bottom:16px; }
.c-aside .lead { font-size:15px; margin-bottom:28px; }
.c-links { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px; margin-bottom:24px; }
.c-link { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; padding:18px; background:var(--ink3); border:1px solid var(--border3); border-radius:3px; text-decoration:none; transition:border-color .25s; }
.c-link:hover { border-color:var(--border); }
.c-link-ico { width:40px; height:40px; flex-shrink:0; border-radius:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:18px; }
.c-link h4 { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text); margin-bottom:2px; }
.c-link p, .c-link a { font-size:12px; color:var(--text2); text-decoration:none; transition:color .2s; }
.c-link:hover p, .c-link:hover a { color:var(--gold2); }
.guarantee { background:var(--glow2); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:3px; padding:20px; }
.guarantee strong { display:block; font-family:var(--fh); font-size:12px; letter-spacing:2px; color:var(--gold2); margin-bottom:8px; }
.guarantee p { font-size:13px; color:var(--text2); line-height:1.75; }

/* ════════════ FOOTER ════════════ */
footer { background:var(--ink2); border-top:1px solid var(--border3); padding:54px 0 0; }
.f-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:36px; margin-bottom:36px; }
.f-brand { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:11px; text-decoration:none; margin-bottom:14px; }
.f-brand img { width:30px; height:30px; object-fit:contain; filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(245,158,11,.5)); }
.f-brand-name { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:17px; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:4px; color:var(--text); }
.f-col p { font-size:13px; color:var(--text3); line-height:1.75; max-width:240px; margin-top:10px; }
.f-col h4 { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:12px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:16px; color:var(--text); }
.f-links { list-style:none; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:9px; }
.f-links a { font-size:13px; color:var(--text3); text-decoration:none; transition:color .2s; }
.f-links a:hover { color:var(--gold2); }
.socials { display:flex; gap:8px; margin-top:18px; }
.soc { width:33px; height:33px; border-radius:3px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.04); border:1px solid var(--border3); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:12px; text-decoration:none; color:var(--text3); transition:all .25s; font-family:var(--fh); }
.soc:hover { background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--orange)); border-color:transparent; color:var(--ink); }
.f-2h { padding:14px; background:var(--glow2); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:2px; margin-top:20px; }
.f-2h-lbl { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:8px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:4px; }
.f-2h-val { font-family:var(--fh); font-size:24px; font-weight:900; color:var(--gold2); }
.f-bot { border-top:1px solid var(--border3); padding:20px 0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; font-size:12px; color:var(--text3); }
.f-bot a { color:var(--gold); text-decoration:none; }
.f-bot a:hover { color:var(--gold2); }

/* ════════════ FLOAT WA ════════════ */
.wa-float { position:fixed; bottom:26px; right:22px; z-index:998; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:9px; padding:12px 20px; border-radius:100px; background:#25d366; color:#fff; font-family:var(--fb); font-size:13px; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; box-shadow:0 4px 22px rgba(37,211,102,.4); transition:all .3s; }
.wa-float:hover { background:#1fbb59; transform:scale(1.05); box-shadow:0 6px 30px rgba(37,211,102,.55); }

/* ════════════ REVEAL ANIMATIONS ════════════ */
.r  { opacity:0; transform:translateY(28px); transition:opacity .7s var(--ease),transform .7s var(--ease); }
.rl { opacity:0; transform:translateX(-28px); transition:opacity .7s var(--ease),transform .7s var(--ease); }
.rr { opacity:0; transform:translateX(28px); transition:opacity .7s var(--ease),transform .7s var(--ease); }
.r.on, .rl.on, .rr.on { opacity:1; transform:none; }

/* ════════════ RESPONSIVE ════════════ */
@media(max-width:1024px) {
  .hero-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; text-align:center; gap:40px; }
  .hero-visual { order:-1; }
  .hero-logo { width:200px; height:200px; }
  .ring-1{width:280px;height:280px} .ring-2{width:230px;height:230px} .ring-3{width:180px;height:180px}
  .hero-actions { justify-content:center; }
  .hero-desc { margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; }
  .svc-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
  .addons { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
  .proc-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:36px; }
  .proc-grid::before { display:none; }
  .port-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; grid-template-rows:auto; }
  .port-i:nth-child(1){ grid-column:span 2; grid-row:span 1; }
  .port-i:nth-child(1) .port-emoji { font-size:60px; }
  .price-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .tst-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
  .contact-g { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .f-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
}
@media(max-width:768px) {
  .nav-links, .nav-cta { display:none; }
  .hamburger { display:flex; }
  .svc-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .addons { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
  .proc-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .port-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; grid-template-rows:auto; }
  .port-i:nth-child(1){ grid-column:span 1; }
  .tst-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .f-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .f-bot { flex-direction:column; gap:8px; text-align:center; }
  .fg-row { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .hero-kpis { flex-wrap:wrap; gap:12px; }
  .kpi { min-width:40%; }
  .kpi:not(:last-child)::after { display:none; }
  .sec { padding:64px 0; }
  .hero-logo{width:160px;height:160px}
  .ring-1{width:220px;height:220px} .ring-2{width:180px;height:180px} .ring-3{width:140px;height:140px}
}
@media(max-width:480px) {
  .addons { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Custom Cursor -->
<div id="cur"></div>
<div id="cur-ring"></div>

<!-- ══════════ NAVBAR ══════════ -->
<nav id="navbar">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="#" class="logo">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Trinity">
      <div class="logo-txt">
        <span class="logo-name">TRINITY</span>
        <span class="logo-sub">Web Studio</span>
      </div>
    </a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="#servicos">Serviços</a></li>
      <li><a href="#portfolio">Portfolio</a></li>
      <li><a href="#precos">Preços</a></li>
      <li><a href="#faq">FAQ</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contacto">Contacto</a></li>
    </ul>
    <a href="#contacto" class="btn btn-gold-line nav-cta" id="navCta" style="display:none">Orçamento Grátis</a>
    <button class="hamburger" id="hamBtn" aria-label="Menu">
      <span></span><span></span><span></span>
    </button>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- Mobile Menu -->
<div class="mob-menu" id="mobMenu">
  <button class="mob-x" id="mobX" aria-label="Fechar">✕</button>
  <a href="#servicos" onclick="closeMob()">Serviços</a>
  <a href="#portfolio" onclick="closeMob()">Portfolio</a>
  <a href="#precos" onclick="closeMob()">Preços</a>
  <a href="#faq" onclick="closeMob()">FAQ</a>
  <a href="#contacto" onclick="closeMob()">Contacto</a>
</div>

<!-- ══════════ HERO ══════════ -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="h-amb h-amb-1"></div>
  <div class="h-amb h-amb-2"></div>
  <div class="h-amb h-amb-3"></div>
  <div class="scan"></div>
  <div class="pts" id="pts"></div>

  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="hero-grid">
      <!-- Text -->
      <div class="hero-text">
        <div class="hero-free r">
          <span class="hero-free-dot"></span>
          🎁 Orçamento 100% Grátis · Sem Compromisso
        </div>
        <div class="eyebrow hero-eyebrow r" style="transition-delay:.06s">Agência Digital · Portugal</div>
        <h1 class="h1 hero-title r" style="transition-delay:.12s">
          Sites que<br><span class="grad">vendem.</span>
        </h1>
        <p class="lead hero-desc r" style="transition-delay:.2s">
          Criamos websites premium que transformam visitantes em clientes reais — com design único, velocidade e estratégia de conversão desde o primeiro pixel.
        </p>
        <div class="hero-actions r" style="transition-delay:.28s">
          <a href="#contacto" class="btn btn-fire"><span>🚀 Quero o Meu Site</span></a>
          <a href="#portfolio" class="btn btn-line">Ver Portfolio →</a>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-kpis r" style="transition-delay:.36s">
          <div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-n">+<em>60</em></div><div class="kpi-l">Sites entregues</div></div>
          <div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-n"><em>72</em>h</div><div class="kpi-l">Entrega express</div></div>
          <div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-n">4.<em>9</em>★</div><div class="kpi-l">Avaliação</div></div>
          <div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-n">+<em>3x</em></div><div class="kpi-l">Conversões</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Visual -->
      <div class="hero-visual rr" style="transition-delay:.14s">
        <div class="ring ring-1"></div>
        <div class="ring ring-2"></div>
        <div class="ring ring-3"></div>
        <div class="hero-orb"></div>
        <img class="hero-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Trinity Logo">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-cue"><span>Scroll</span><div class="scroll-line"></div></div>
</section>

<!-- MARQUEE -->
<div class="marquee-bar">
  <div class="mq-track">
    <span class="mq-item">Design Premium</span>
    <span class="mq-item">SEO Técnico</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Mobile First</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Alta Conversão</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Entrega Rápida</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Orçamento Grátis</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Resultados Reais</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Suporte Incluído</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Design Premium</span>
    <span class="mq-item">SEO Técnico</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Mobile First</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Alta Conversão</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Entrega Rápida</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Orçamento Grátis</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Resultados Reais</span>
    <span class="mq-item">Suporte Incluído</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════ SERVICES ══════════ -->
<section class="sec" id="servicos">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="svc-head r">
      <div class="eyebrow" style="justify-content:center">O que fazemos</div>
      <h2 class="h2">Serviços que <span class="grad">transformam</span></h2>
      <p class="lead" style="max-width:480px;margin:14px auto 0">Tratamos cada projeto como se fosse o nosso próprio negócio — com obsessão total pelo detalhe e pelos resultados.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="svc-grid">
      <!-- Site Institucional -->
      <div class="svc-c r">
        <div class="svc-n">01</div>
        <div class="svc-ico">🖥️</div>
        <h3 class="h3" style="margin-bottom:10px">Site Institucional</h3>
        <p>A sua presença digital profissional. Design personalizado, totalmente responsivo e optimizado para converter visitantes em contactos reais.</p>
        <div class="svc-fs">
          <div class="svc-f">Design 100% personalizado</div>
          <div class="svc-f">Responsivo mobile-first</div>
          <div class="svc-f">Formulário de contacto</div>
          <div class="svc-f">SEO básico + Analytics</div>
          <div class="svc-f">Entrega em 5–7 dias</div>
        </div>
        <div class="svc-price"><span class="p-from">A partir de&nbsp;</span><span class="p-val"><sup>€</sup>350</span></div>
        <a href="#contacto" class="btn btn-gold-line" style="margin-top:16px;width:100%;justify-content:center">Orçamento Grátis →</a>
      </div>
      <!-- Loja Online -->
      <div class="svc-c r" style="transition-delay:.1s">
        <div class="svc-n">02</div>
        <div class="svc-ico">🛒</div>
        <h3 class="h3" style="margin-bottom:10px">Loja Online</h3>
        <p>E-commerce completo e funcional com catálogo de produtos, carrinho e integração com métodos de pagamento portugueses.</p>
        <div class="svc-fs">
          <div class="svc-f">Catálogo de produtos</div>
          <div class="svc-f">Multibanco / MB Way</div>
          <div class="svc-f">Painel de gestão simples</div>
          <div class="svc-f">SEO para e-commerce</div>
          <div class="svc-f">Entrega em 10–15 dias</div>
        </div>
        <div class="svc-price"><span class="p-from">A partir de&nbsp;</span><span class="p-val"><sup>€</sup>790</span></div>
        <a href="#contacto" class="btn btn-fire" style="margin-top:16px;width:100%;justify-content:center"><span>Orçamento Grátis →</span></a>
      </div>
      <!-- Landing Page -->
      <div class="svc-c r" style="transition-delay:.2s">
        <div class="svc-n">03</div>
        <div class="svc-ico">⚡</div>
        <h3 class="h3" style="margin-bottom:10px">Landing Page</h3>
        <p>Uma página focada em converter. Ideal para campanhas, lançamentos e geração de leads com taxa de conversão maximizada.</p>
        <div class="svc-fs">
          <div class="svc-f">Estrutura CRO optimizada</div>
          <div class="svc-f">Carregamento ultra-rápido</div>
          <div class="svc-f">Integração com CRM</div>
          <div class="svc-f">Velocidade 100/100</div>
          <div class="svc-f">Entrega em 48–72h</div>
        </div>
        <div class="svc-price"><span class="p-from">A partir de&nbsp;</span><span class="p-val"><sup>€</sup>199</span></div>
        <a href="#contacto" class="btn btn-gold-line" style="margin-top:16px;width:100%;justify-content:center">Orçamento Grátis →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Add-ons -->
    <div class="addons">
      <div class="addon r" style="transition-delay:.05s"><div class="addon-ico">📈</div><h4>SEO Avançado</h4><p>Apareça no topo do Google para as palavras que importam.</p><span class="p-val" style="font-size:20px"><sup style="font-size:10px">€</sup>149<span style="font-size:11px;font-family:var(--fb)">/mês</span></span></div>
      <div class="addon r" style="transition-delay:.1s"><div class="addon-ico">🔧</div><h4>Manutenção</h4><p>Actualizações, backups e suporte técnico prioritário.</p><span class="p-val" style="font-size:20px"><sup style="font-size:10px">€</sup>49<span style="font-size:11px;font-family:var(--fb)">/mês</span></span></div>
      <div class="addon r" style="transition-delay:.15s"><div class="addon-ico">🎨</div><h4>Identidade Visual</h4><p>Logo, cores e tipografia. Uma marca que fica na memória.</p><span class="p-val" style="font-size:20px"><sup style="font-size:10px">€</sup>249</span></div>
      <div class="addon r" style="transition-delay:.2s"><div class="addon-ico">📱</div><h4>Redes Sociais</h4><p>Gestão de Instagram, Facebook e Google My Business.</p><span class="p-val" style="font-size:20px"><sup style="font-size:10px">€</sup>99<span style="font-size:11px;font-family:var(--fb)">/mês</span></span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ══════════ PROCESS ══════════ -->
<section class="sec sec-alt" id="processo">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="proc-head r">
      <div class="eyebrow" style="justify-content:center">Como trabalhamos</div>
      <h2 class="h2">Do briefing ao <span class="grad">lançamento</span></h2>
      <p class="lead" style="max-width:440px;margin:14px auto 0">Processo simples e transparente, focado em entregar resultados no menor tempo possível.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="proc-grid">
      <div class="proc-step r"><div class="proc-num">01</div><h4>Briefing</h4><p>Percebemos o seu negócio, objetivos e público numa conversa de 30 minutos.</p></div>
      <div class="proc-step r" style="transition-delay:.1s"><div class="proc-num">02</div><h4>Proposta</h4><p>Enviamos orçamento detalhado e cronograma em menos de 24 horas.</p></div>
      <div class="proc-step r" style="transition-delay:.2s"><div class="proc-num">03</div><h4>Desenvolvimento</h4><p>Construímos o site com actualizações regulares e feedback contínuo.</p></div>
      <div class="proc-step r" style="transition-delay:.3s"><div class="proc-num">04</div><h4>Lançamento</h4><p>Publicação, testes finais e formação para gerir o site autonomamente.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ══════════ PORTFOLIO ══════════ -->
<section class="sec" id="portfolio">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="port-bar">
      <div>
        <div class="eyebrow r">Trabalhos recentes</div>
        <h2 class="h2 r">Portfolio</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="port-filters r">
        <button class="pf act" onclick="pf(this,'all')">Todos</button>
        <button class="pf" onclick="pf(this,'inst')">Institucional</button>
        <button class="pf" onclick="pf(this,'ec')">E-commerce</button>
        <button class="pf" onclick="pf(this,'lp')">Landing Page</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="port-grid r">
      <div class="port-i" data-c="inst">

<!-- ══════════ FAQ ══════════ -->
<section class="sec sec-alt" id="faq">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:52px">
      <div class="eyebrow r" style="justify-content:center">Perguntas frequentes</div>
      <h2 class="h2 r">Tem <span class="grad">dúvidas?</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-wrap r">
      <div class="faq-i"><div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">Quanto tempo demora a fazer o meu site?<div class="faq-ico">+</div></div><div class="faq-a">Uma landing page fica pronta em 48–72h. Um site institucional demora 5–7 dias úteis. Uma loja online completa entre 10–15 dias. Após o briefing enviamos cronograma preciso.</div></div>
      <div class="faq-i"><div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">Preciso de saber programar para gerir o site?<div class="faq-ico">+</div></div><div class="faq-a">Não. Todos os sites incluem painel de administração simples e intuitivo. Fazemos formação gratuita após a entrega para que consiga actualizar textos, imagens e conteúdos de forma autónoma.</div></div>
      <div class="faq-i"><div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">O site fica no meu nome ou da Trinity?<div class="faq-ico">+</div></div><div class="faq-a">O site é 100% seu. Após o pagamento, transferimos todos os ficheiros, domínios e credenciais. Não há lock-in nem dependência da Trinity para o funcionamento do site.</div></div>
      <div class="faq-i"><div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">E se não gostar do resultado?<div class="faq-ico">+</div></div><div class="faq-a">Incluímos 2 rondas de revisões em todos os projetos. O pagamento final só é feito após a sua aprovação. Se o projeto não avançar antes do desenvolvimento, devolvemos o sinal na totalidade.</div></div>
      <div class="faq-i"><div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">O site vai aparecer no Google?<div class="faq-ico">+</div></div><div class="faq-a">Todos os sites incluem SEO técnico básico: URLs amigáveis, meta tags, sitemap e schema markup. Para resultados avançados recomendamos o nosso serviço de SEO mensal.</div></div>
      <div class="faq-i"><div class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">Aceitam pagamento faseado?<div class="faq-ico">+</div></div><div class="faq-a">Sim. O modelo padrão é 50% no início e 50% na entrega. Para projetos acima de 1.000€ podemos acordar um plano em 3 prestações. Aceitamos transferência bancária, MB Way e cartão de crédito.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════ CONTACT ══════════ -->
<section class="sec sec-alt" id="contacto">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:52px">
      <div class="eyebrow r" style="justify-content:center">Fale connosco</div>
      <h2 class="h2 r">Vamos criar algo<br><span class="grad">extraordinário.</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-g">
      <!-- Form -->
      <div class="c-form rl">
        <h3 class="h3" style="margin-bottom:6px">Peça o Seu Orçamento <span class="grad2">Grátis</span></h3>
        <p class="small" style="margin-bottom:24px">Resposta garantida em menos de 2 horas.</p>
        <div class="fg-row">
          <div class="fg"><label>Nome *</label><input type="text" placeholder="O seu nome"></div>
          <div class="fg"><label>Telemóvel *</label><input type="tel" placeholder="9XX XXX XXX"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="fg"><label>Email *</label><input type="email" placeholder="email@empresa.pt"></div>
        <div class="fg">
          <label>Tipo de projeto *</label>
          <select>
            <option value="">Selecionar...</option>
            <option>Site Institucional</option>
            <option>Loja Online (E-commerce)</option>
            <option>Landing Page</option>
            <option>Redesign de site existente</option>
            <option>SEO / Marketing Digital</option>
            <option>Outro</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="fg">
          <label>Orçamento aproximado</label>
          <select>
            <option>Até 500€</option>
            <option>500€ – 1.000€</option>
            <option>1.000€ – 3.000€</option>
            <option>Acima de 3.000€</option>
            <option>Não sei ainda</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="fg"><label>Mensagem</label><textarea placeholder="Conte-nos o seu projeto, objetivos e prazo..."></textarea></div>
        <button class="btn btn-fire" style="width:100%;justify-content:center" onclick="submitForm(this)">
          <span>📩 Enviar Pedido de Orçamento Grátis</span>
        </button>
        <div class="form-ok" id="formOk">
          <div style="font-size:28px;margin-bottom:8px">🎯</div>
          <strong style="color:var(--gold2);font-family:var(--fh);letter-spacing:2px;font-size:14px">PEDIDO RECEBIDO!</strong>
          <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:8px">Entraremos em contacto em menos de 2 horas.</p>
        </div>
        <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:14px;text-align:center">🔒 Os seus dados não são partilhados com terceiros.</p>
      </div>
      <!-- Info -->
      <div class="c-aside rr">
        <div class="eyebrow">Contacto directo</div>
        <h2 class="h2" style="font-size:clamp(22px,3vw,36px);margin-bottom:16px">Prefere falar<br><span class="grad">directamente?</span></h2>
        <p class="lead" style="font-size:15px;margin-bottom:26px">Estamos disponíveis por WhatsApp, email ou chamada — escolha o que for mais cómodo.</p>
        <div class="c-links">
          <a href="https://wa.me/351910000000" class="c-link">
            <div class="c-link-ico" style="background:rgba(37,211,102,.12);border:1px solid rgba(37,211,102,.2)">💬</div>
            <div><h4>WhatsApp</h4><p>+351 910 000 000</p></div>
          </a>
          <a href="mailto:ola@trinity.pt" class="c-link">
            <div class="c-link-ico" style="background:var(--glow2);border:1px solid var(--border)">✉️</div>
            <div><h4>Email</h4><p>ola@trinity.pt</p></div>
          </a>
          <div class="c-link" style="cursor:default">
            <div class="c-link-ico" style="background:var(--glow2);border:1px solid var(--border)">🕐</div>
            <div><h4>Horário</h4><p>Seg–Sex · 9h–19h · Resposta em &lt;2h</p></div>
          </div>
          <div class="c-link" style="cursor:default">
            <div class="c-link-ico" style="background:var(--glow2);border:1px solid var(--border)">📍</div>
            <div><h4>Localização</h4><p>Lisboa, Portugal · Atendemos todo o país</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="guarantee">
          <strong>✦ GARANTIA TRINITY</strong>
          <p>Se não ficar 100% satisfeito com o resultado final, <strong style="color:var(--text)">não paga o valor restante.</strong> A sua satisfação é a nossa prioridade absoluta.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Floating WhatsApp -->
<a href="https://wa.me/351910000000" class="wa-float" aria-label="WhatsApp">
  💬 WhatsApp
</a>

<script>
/* ── CURSOR ── */
const c = document.getElementById('cur'), cr = document.getElementById('cur-ring');
let mx=0, my=0, rx=0, ry=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY;
  c.style.left = mx+'px'; c.style.top = my+'px';
});
(function loop(){ rx+=(mx-rx)*.11; ry+=(my-ry)*.11; cr.style.left=rx+'px'; cr.style.top=ry+'px'; requestAnimationFrame(loop); })();
document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.svc-c,.port-i,.tst-c,.faq-q,.addon,.pc').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{ c.style.width='18px'; c.style.height='18px'; cr.style.width='52px'; cr.style.height='52px'; });
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{ c.style.width='8px'; c.style.height='8px'; cr.style.width='34px'; cr.style.height='34px'; });
});

/* ── NAV ── */
const nav = document.getElementById('navbar'), navCta = document.getElementById('navCta');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  nav.classList.toggle('stuck', scrollY > 60);
  navCta.style.display = scrollY > 300 ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
});

/* ── MOBILE MENU ── */
document.getElementById('hamBtn').onclick = () => document.getElementById('mobMenu').classList.add('open');
document.getElementById('mobX').onclick = () => document.getElementById('mobMenu').classList.remove('open');
function closeMob() { document.getElementById('mobMenu').classList.remove('open'); }

/* ── PORTFOLIO FILTER ── */
function pf(btn, cat) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.pf').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('act'));
  btn.classList.add('act');
  document.querySelectorAll('.port-i').forEach(i => {
    i.style.display = (cat==='all' || i.dataset.c===cat) ? 'flex' : 'none';
  });
}

/* ── FAQ ── */
function toggleFaq(el) {
  const item = el.closest('.faq-i');
  const open = item.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('.faq-i').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('open'));
  if (!open) item.classList.add('open');
}

/* ── FORM ── */
function submitForm(btn) {
  btn.innerHTML = '<span>⏳ A enviar...</span>';
  btn.disabled = true;
  setTimeout(() => {
    btn.style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('formOk').classList.add('show');
  }, 1600);
}

/* ── PARTICLES ── */
(function() {
  const wrap = document.getElementById('pts');
  for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className = 'pt';
    const s = Math.random() * 3 + 1;
    d.style.cssText = `width:${s}px;height:${s}px;left:${Math.random()*100}%;animation-duration:${10+Math.random()*14}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*12}s;`;
    wrap.appendChild(d);
  }
})();

/* ── SCROLL REVEAL ── */
const ro = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('on'); ro.unobserve(e.target); } });
}, { threshold: 0.08, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
document.querySelectorAll('.r,.rl,.rr').forEach(el => ro.observe(el));

/* Instant hero reveal */
document.querySelectorAll('#hero .r, #hero .rl, #hero .rr').forEach((el,i) => {
  setTimeout(() => el.classList.add('on'), 80 + i * 120);
});
</script>

<!-- Schema.org -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"ProfessionalService","name":"Trinity Web Studio","description":"Criação de websites premium em Portugal com design, conversão e resultados reais.","url":"https://trinity.pt","telephone":"+351910000000","email":"ola@trinity.pt","address":{"@type":"PostalAddress","addressLocality":"Lisboa","addressCountry":"PT"},"openingHours":"Mo-Fr 09:00-19:00","priceRange":"€€","aggregateRating":{"@type":"AggregateRating","ratingValue":"4.9","reviewCount":"60"}}
</script>
</body>
</html>
